project_name: LEXA Smart Project Builder - The Intelligence Engine

identity.core_philosophy: Consultative Intelligence over Linear Forms. The user is an architect, not a data entry clerk.
anti_patterns: No 'Spinners' - Use data visualization for loading states
No 'Primary Blue' buttons - Use Gold or Monochrome

technical.usage: Specs, pricing, BOQ data, confidence scores

styles.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#FAD02C] transition-all duration-300 font-medium rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-8 py-3
styles.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2A2A] text-[#94A3B8] hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-8 py-3
styles.ghost: text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px]

Card.style: bg-[#121212]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#2A2A2A] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors duration-500
Card.interaction: Scale 1.01 on hover, Gold Glow shadow

Input.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#2A2A2A] focus:border-[#D4AF37] outline-none text-[#F8FAFC] placeholder-[#475569] py-3 text-lg font-light transition-colors rounded-none
Input.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#94A3B8] mb-1 block

elements: Sub: 'A logic-driven engine for project specification. Not a catalog.' (DM Sans)
Visual: Abstract slowly rotating 3D node structure (Spline or CSS lines) in background

ProjectDNA_Capture.layout: Two-column split. Left: Questions. Right: Real-time 'DNA String' construction.
ProjectDNA_Capture.interaction: As user selects 'Villa', the 3D model/icon on right morphs into a Villa structure.

Objective_Selector.behavior: Multi-select. Selected cards glow Gold. Non-selected fade to 30% opacity.

Intelligence_Engine.visual: A force-directed graph (using D3 or React Flow) where nodes pop up as dependencies are calculated.
Intelligence_Engine.edges: Gold lines connecting dependent systems (e.g., Cinema -> requires -> Network).
Intelligence_Engine.tooltip: Hovering a link explains 'Why?': 'Cinema projectors require hardwired Cat6 connection.'

Proposal_Comparison.highlight: The 'Balanced' or 'Flagship' column is slightly elevated (z-10) with a subtle gold border.
Proposal_Comparison.features: Accordion lists for features. Price estimates in blurred text (reveal on hover) or ranges.

tech_stack.animation: Framer Motion (for page transitions and graph nodes)

implementation_guide.file_extension_rule: Use .js / .jsx for all new component files as requested. Use PropTypes for type checking if needed.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Gold text is readable on Black (use #D4AF37 minimum).
accessibility.aria: All graph nodes must be keyboard navigable.

images.query: modern luxury villa night lighting architecture gold
futuristic smart home interface hologram dark
server rack data center artistic lighting dark
luxury home cinema dark moody lighting

universal_guidelines.interactions: Hover states must be instantaneous (duration-200). Page transitions should be smooth (opacity/y-axis).
